scenario.context: Station 8 of the daily run: acceptance, handover, and reflection.
scenario.mission: You assess the technical acceptance and draft a short handover note.

constraints: Formulate the handover briefly and clearly

customerRequest.subject: Acceptance and handover for Station NS-ST-08
customerRequest.body: Please perform the technical acceptance for NS-ST-08 and draft a short handover protocol with status, residual risk, and next step.

questions.title: Technical acceptance criteria
questions.prompt: Which criteria belong to a technical acceptance? (Multiple selections)

options.text: Network access and core applications work
Only a photo of the workstation
options.rationale: Not a technical acceptance proof by itself.

options.text: A short documented functional test is available
Private user wishes implemented without coordination

feedback.correct: Correct: acceptance is based on measurable technical criteria.
feedback.wrong: Partly off: please weight evidence and core functionality more strongly.

questions.title: Handover process
items: Name open points and residual risks
correctOrder: Name open points and residual risks

feedback.correct: Correct: this makes the release transparent and reliable.
feedback.wrong: Not optimal: start with criteria and tests, then protocol and release.

questions.title: Handling residual risk
questions.prompt: A test is just within limits but noticeable. What is the best next step?

options.text: Document residual risk, agree on monitoring, and set the next review date
options.rationale: Responsible handling of a borderline result.

feedback.correct: Correct: handle and manage risk transparently.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: residual risks must be documented and tracked actively.

questions.title: Acceptance rate
questions.prompt: Of 16 tested devices, 14 pass acceptance immediately. What is the acceptance rate in percent?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate the share and convert to percent.

questions.title: Handover note
questions.prompt: Write a short handover note (4-6 sentences) with status, residual risk, and next step.
questions.expectedOutline: Clear status, named residual risk, concrete follow-up action.

feedback.correct: Correct: The note is usable for operations and follow-up.
feedback.wrong: Please state status, risk, and follow-up action more concretely.
